`runJudge` merges payloads into Fork Report. gap_fills, zero emojis in output.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Merges agent outputs + fork rules
- [x] Inserts report, githubOutputs, userRequests when needed
- [x] Schedules emitOutputs + generateVoiceBrief

## Labels

`buildathon`, `layer-judge`, `partner-hermes`
